name: Meok Iata Dgr Air Cargo Mcp
description: IATA DGR air-cargo compliance — ICAO Annex 18, IATA DGR 66, lithium-battery PI 965-970, Shipper's Declaration §8, acceptance checklist §9, state + operator variations. For forwarders + EV-recall carriers shipping by air. By MEOK AI Labs.
